svg.title: Renato Grasso — single-buffer terminal profile
svg.desc: One continuous terminal session: boot, whoami, stack, focus, telemetry, neofetch, languages.

g.text: 100101 // backend lab // handlers // contracts // load probes
latency budget: p95 p99 error-rate throughput
building automation, quality gates, perf probes and backend labs
breaking things on purpose, then fixing them
ship software that does not page anyone at 3am

text.tspan: test automation that catches regressions before deploy
API, mobile and web quality pipelines end-to-end
performance budgets and SLO thinking with k6
flaky tests, manual smoke runs, "works on my machine"
